summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: 1) Data Center with Team & Growth Partners, 2) Amount field in Student CRM onboarding, 3) Autocomplete in Add Lead forms. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/data-center/stats - Returns 5 categories: students, schools, educators, team, growth_partners
Backend: GET /api/data-center/stats - Returns status breakdown for all 5 categories
Backend: GET /api/data-center/search - Returns all 5 data types
Backend: GET /api/data-center/search?data_type=team - Filter by team works
Backend: GET /api/data-center/search?data_type=growth_partners - Filter by growth_partners works
Backend: GET /api/data-center/autocomplete?q=test - Autocomplete endpoint works
Backend: Autocomplete returns proper fields for auto-fill (name, phone, email, city, etc.)
Backend: Autocomplete enforces minimum 2 character query length
Backend: Autocomplete searches by phone number
Backend: Autocomplete searches by email
Backend: PATCH /api/students/inquiry/{id} - Accepts conversion_amount field
Backend: conversion_amount field persists in student inquiry model
Backend: GET /api/admin/reports/overview - Returns revenue including conversion_amount
Backend: Revenue calculation includes conversion_amount from onboarding
Backend: Cleanup - Archive TEST_ prefixed data
Frontend: Data Center shows 5 stat cards (Students: 70, Schools: 29, Educators: 23, Team: 4, Growth Partners: 8)
Frontend: Data Center type filter has 'Team' and 'Growth Partners' options
Frontend: Student CRM Convert & Onboard modal has 'Amount (₹)' field at top
Frontend: Amount field is highlighted in yellow and marked as mandatory
Frontend: Student CRM Add Lead form shows autocomplete info banner
Frontend: Student CRM autocomplete shows suggestions when typing 3+ chars
Frontend: School CRM Add Lead form shows autocomplete info banner
Frontend: School CRM autocomplete shows suggestions when typing 3+ chars
Frontend: Reports page shows Total Revenue (₹10,000) calculated from conversion_amount
updated_files: /app/tests/test_new_features.py - Created comprehensive test file for new features
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing was archived after tests completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully tested and working: 1) Data Center now shows 5 stat cards including Team and Growth Partners with proper filtering. 2) Student CRM Convert & Onboard modal has new Amount (₹) field at top that saves to conversion_amount and is included in revenue reports. 3) Both Student CRM and School CRM Add Lead forms have autocomplete that searches existing records by name/phone/email and auto-fills the form when clicked.

Data_Center_5_Stat_Cards.details: Shows Students (70), Schools (29), Educators (23), Team (4), Growth Partners (8) with status breakdowns

Data_Center_Type_Filter.details: Type filter dropdown includes 'Team' and 'Growth Partners' options that filter results correctly

Student_CRM_Amount_Field.details: Convert & Onboard modal has 'Amount (₹)' field at top, highlighted in yellow, marked as mandatory

Student_CRM_Autocomplete.details: Add Lead form shows autocomplete suggestions when typing 3+ chars in name/phone/email fields

School_CRM_Autocomplete.details: Add Lead form shows autocomplete suggestions when typing 3+ chars in school name/phone/email fields

Revenue_Reports_Conversion_Amount.details: Reports page shows Total Revenue (₹10,000) which includes conversion_amount from student onboarding

elements_verified: Type filter with Team and Growth Partners options
Create New Batch / Join Existing Batch options
